news.t: Globalization Is Over. It's Time to Embrace the Winners.

overview.description: The iShares J.P. Morgan EM Local Currency Bond ETF (LEMB) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund tracks a market-value weighted index of sovereign debt denominated in issuers' local currencies, with limits on country exposure. LEMB was launched on Oct 18, 2011 and is issued by BlackRock.
infoTable: J.P. Morgan GBI-EM Global 15 cap 4.5 floor

data.title: Globalization Is Over. It's Time to Embrace the Winners.
data.text: As the world pulls in, emerging market bonds look like a once-in-a-generation opportunity. Here are the ETFs to buy.
